title: Trading Forex Used To Be HARD AF, Until I Realized This...

transcript_segments.text: I wasn't happy with how I traded Forex

about to show you. Um, a lot of it comes
from just experience. I've traded Forex

to trade, like 4,600 people over the

I keep seeing sort of the same things

help people solve this is I've been
running this free Telegram channel here

trades. So I share my live trades here.
I share the analysis. I share um you

And what I want to do is I want to break

Kirkland. So, he helps out with

right now and a lot of the things that

What do you think for you? So like let

approaching trading?
>> Okay, sweet. Um what about whenever you

>> Um trying to make money cuz back when

well, I'll go to the next one. I'm

And then following that pattern of
trying to make money is like what
screwed me. So,
a lot of people focus on so many of the

like actually getting profitable. You
know, I was no exception of that. So,
like I was hellbent on making money. So
I would like I didn't have a lot of

Fibonacci. You might be looking at

There's a bunch of stuff to look at,

it really just confuses a lot of people.
So how I got profitable trading was I
would do really liquid pairs like Euro
USD and GBP JPY and I would use the
lower time frames like 5 minute 15
minute and what would happen is
basically when price would get really

So, I would counter markets that were

markets really overextended to the

on the on the relative strength index,

I could get out of it. But what I found
is this was a real pain in the ass. And
it was a pain in the ass when I started
to get more trading capital because as I
started growing my capital from, you
know, I I lost like $8,300 my first year

like almost half of everything I made

And I had a loss in forex trading. And
so when I was able to grow that money,
right, so over the course of about a

after looking at my tax returns. Um was

And then for my jobs, I came out that

doing it this way, what I realized is a

like yes, price is going to reverse most

every time I doubled it, I could grow

that would go from 6K to 8K and I keep

Sometimes I would get it within a week.
Sometimes it would be two or 3 weeks.
And then I'd notice maybe about once a

account. So what I started doing is I

when things started really falling, I
could add in heavy to a position. And
then I got to the point where sometimes
I was like crippling an account. And
sometimes it would be it usually

And then I'd withdraw 5K. And then I

And again, when it would start reverting

okay, if I think price is going to

We've been going up on the 1 hour, then

And then I'd use that context of it

And I noticed that on my winning trades,

and going to the other side of a zone,

the previous major high on the 1 hour
chart. So, what I started doing is I
started saying, okay, if price does
that, what I could do is I could just
close the trade at a loss. So, say I
enter a sell here at the resistance and
then price goes up against me, I could
close it at a loss, just above the zone,

at. So, let's say even further back, you

went right here, made this high. So, I'd

could just enter another sell. But I
could enter a sell here at this zone.
And that way, you know, if it got here,
you know, the idea would be that it
